38 | class RepositoryPool(AbstractRepository):
 39 |     def __init__(
 40 |         self,
 41 |         repositories: list[Repository] | None = None,
 42 |         *,
 43 |         config: Config | None = None,
 44 |     ) -> None:
 45 |         super().__init__("poetry-repository-pool")
 46 |         self._repositories: OrderedDict[str, PrioritizedRepository] = OrderedDict()
 47 | 
 48 |         if repositories is None:
 49 |             repositories = []
 50 |         for repository in repositories:
 51 |             self.add_repository(repository)
 52 | 
 53 |         self._artifact_cache = ArtifactCache(
 54 |             cache_dir=(config or Config.create()).artifacts_cache_directory
 55 |         )
 56 | 
 57 |     @staticmethod
 58 |     def from_packages(packages: list[Package], config: Config | None) -> RepositoryPool:
 59 |         pool = RepositoryPool(config=config)
 60 |         for package in packages:
 61 |             if package.is_direct_origin():
 62 |                 continue
 63 | 
 64 |             repo_name = package.source_reference or "PyPI"
 65 |             try:
 66 |                 repo = pool.repository(repo_name)
 67 |             except IndexError:
 68 |                 repo = Repository(repo_name)
 69 |                 pool.add_repository(repo)
 70 | 
 71 |             if not repo.has_package(package):
 72 |                 repo.add_package(package)
 73 | 
 74 |         return pool
 75 | 
 76 |     @property
 77 |     def repositories(self) -> list[Repository]:
 78 |         """
 79 |         Returns the repositories in the pool,
 80 |         in the order they will be searched for packages.
 81 | 
 82 |         ATTENTION: For backwards compatibility and practical reasons,
 83 |                    repositories with priority EXPLICIT are NOT included,
 84 |                    because they will not be searched.
 85 |         """
 86 |         sorted_repositories = self._sorted_repositories
 87 |         return [
 88 |             prio_repo.repository
 89 |             for prio_repo in sorted_repositories
 90 |             if prio_repo.priority is not Priority.EXPLICIT
 91 |         ]
 92 | 
 93 |     @property
 94 |     def all_repositories(self) -> list[Repository]:
 95 |         return [prio_repo.repository for prio_repo in self._sorted_repositories]
 96 | 
 97 |     @property
 98 |     def _sorted_repositories(self) -> list[PrioritizedRepository]:
 99 |         return sorted(
100 |             self._repositories.values(), key=lambda prio_repo: prio_repo.priority
101 |         )
102 | 
103 |     @property
104 |     def artifact_cache(self) -> ArtifactCache:
105 |         return self._artifact_cache
106 | 
107 |     def has_primary_repositories(self) -> bool:
108 |         return self._contains_priority(Priority.PRIMARY)
109 | 
110 |     def _contains_priority(self, priority: Priority) -> bool:
111 |         return any(
112 |             prio_repo.priority is priority for prio_repo in self._repositories.values()
113 |         )
114 | 
115 |     def has_repository(self, name: str) -> bool:
116 |         return name.lower() in self._repositories
117 | 
118 |     def repository(self, name: str) -> Repository:
119 |         return self._get_prioritized_repository(name).repository
120 | 
121 |     def get_priority(self, name: str) -> Priority:
122 |         return self._get_prioritized_repository(name).priority
123 | 
124 |     def _get_prioritized_repository(self, name: str) -> PrioritizedRepository:
125 |         name = name.lower()
126 |         if self.has_repository(name):
127 |             return self._repositories[name]
128 |         raise IndexError(f'Repository "{name}" does not exist.')
129 | 
130 |     def add_repository(
131 |         self, repository: Repository, *, priority: Priority = Priority.PRIMARY
132 |     ) -> RepositoryPool:
133 |         """
134 |         Adds a repository to the pool.
135 |         """
136 |         repository_name = repository.name.lower()
137 |         if self.has_repository(repository_name):
138 |             raise ValueError(
139 |                 f"A repository with name {repository_name} was already added."
140 |             )
141 | 
142 |         self._repositories[repository_name] = PrioritizedRepository(
143 |             repository, priority
144 |         )
145 |         return self
146 | 
147 |     def remove_repository(self, name: str) -> RepositoryPool:
148 |         if not self.has_repository(name):
149 |             raise IndexError(
150 |                 f"RepositoryPool can not remove unknown repository '{name}'."
151 |             )
152 |         del self._repositories[name.lower()]
153 |         return self
154 | 
155 |     def package(
156 |         self, name: str, version: Version, repository_name: str | None = None
157 |     ) -> Package:
158 |         if repository_name:
159 |             return self.repository(repository_name).package(name, version)
160 | 
161 |         for repo in self.repositories:
162 |             try:
163 |                 return repo.package(name, version)
164 |             except PackageNotFoundError:
165 |                 continue
166 |         raise PackageNotFoundError(f"Package {name} ({version}) not found.")
167 | 
168 |     def find_packages(self, dependency: Dependency) -> list[Package]:
169 |         repository_name = dependency.source_name
170 |         if repository_name:
171 |             return self.repository(repository_name).find_packages(dependency)
172 | 
173 |         packages: list[Package] = []
174 |         for repo in self.repositories:
175 |             if packages and self.get_priority(repo.name) is Priority.SUPPLEMENTAL:
176 |                 break
177 |             packages += repo.find_packages(dependency)
178 |         return packages
179 | 
180 |     def search(self, query: str | list[str]) -> list[Package]:
181 |         results: list[Package] = []
182 |         for repo in self.repositories:
183 |             results += repo.search(query)
184 |         return results
185 | 
186 |     def refresh(self, package: Package) -> Package:
187 |         repository_name = package.source_reference or "PyPI"
188 |         repo = self.repository(repository_name)
189 |         if isinstance(repo, CachedRepository):
190 |             repo.forget(package.name, package.version)
191 |         return repo.package(package.name, package.version)
